name: tsperf-type-lens
description: Prototype VS Code extension that surfaces expensive TypeScript type declarations as CodeLens hints.

tsperfTypeLens.minimumScore.description: Minimum complexity score needed before a CodeLens is shown.

tsperfTypeLens.maximumItems.description: Maximum type declarations shown per file.

scripts.check: node --check src/analyzer.js && node --check src/extension.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.js && node --check scripts/analyze-sample.js && node --check scripts/analyze-many.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run smoke
